title: [AI5] Implement Multi-Agent System Evaluation
summary: Added a deterministic multi-agent trace evaluator. It checks routing selection, sub-agent task understanding, result formatting, and control termination/handoff, then aggregates pass totals and per-check scorecards for an interaction trace.

verification.notes: Built-in sample trace scored 1.0 across routing, understanding, result-format, and control-handoff checks.
